title: API Gateway & Service Mesh
codeSnippet:
spring:
  cloud:
    gateway:
      routes:
        - id: interview-service
          uri: lb://INTERVIEW-SERVICE
          predicates:
            - Path=/api/v1/interviews/**
          filters:
            - AuthFilter
            - name: RequestRateLimiter
              args:
                redis-rate-limiter.replenishRate: 100
useCases: Canary rollout of AI evaluation v2
mTLS between evaluation and scoring services

title: SQL Basics & CRUD
codeSnippet:
SELECT id, name, email FROM users
WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND created_at > '2025-01-01'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

title: Joins & Subqueries
codeSnippet:
SELECT d.name, COUNT(q.id) AS question_count
FROM departments d
LEFT JOIN technologies t ON t.department_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN questions q ON q.technology_id = t.id
GROUP BY d.name
HAVING question_count > 10;

title: PostgreSQL Basics & Data Types
codeSnippet:
CREATE TABLE questions (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    question_text TEXT NOT NULL,
    difficulty VARCHAR(10) CHECK (difficulty IN ('EASY','MEDIUM','HARD')),
    tags JSONB,
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
